items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for timing options.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the timing options (immediate, 1 hour, 24 hours, custom) as part of the feedback collection process. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of these timing options. Therefore, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in the implementation.
